body.sql: SELECT `minute1`, COUNT(*) AS log_count FROM (SELECT `minute1`, `dtEventTimeStamp` FROM `golden_minute_history`.doris WHERE (`dtEventTimeStamp` >= 1784701776000 AND `dtEventTimeStamp` <= 1784702076000 AND `dtEventTime` >= '2026-07-22 14:29:36' AND `dtEventTime` <= '2026-07-22 14:34:37' AND `thedate` = '20260722') UNION ALL SELECT `minute1`, `dtEventTimeStamp` FROM `golden_minute_current`.doris WHERE (`dtEventTimeStamp` >= 1784701776000 AND `dtEventTimeStamp` <= 1784702076000 AND `dtEventTime` >= '2026-07-22 14:29:36' AND `dtEventTime` <= '2026-07-22 14:34:37' AND `thedate` = '20260722')) AS combined_data GROUP BY `minute1` ORDER BY `minute1` DESC LIMIT 100
